_description: PR 3B route-coverage manifest. Every route file calling a BaseProvider or BaseConnector write MUST import handleApprovalQueueError and call it in at least N catch blocks (N = expectedCatchCount). The companion spec test in tests/unit/spec/pr-3b-route-catches.test.ts enforces this. Source: [[project-pr-3b-route-audit-inventory]] (subagent research run 2026-05-19).
_invariants: Adding a new route that calls BaseProvider.sendRequest or BaseConnector write verbs requires either (a) adding a handleApprovalQueueError call in its catch and bumping the expectedCatchCount, OR (b) adding the new file to the manifest. The test fails on either drift direction.
expectedCatchCount counts ONLY catch-block calls — the import line is NOT counted. Grep pattern: 'if (await handleApprovalQueueError'.
Files not in this manifest are not asserted by the test. To add coverage for a new file, append it with the inventory-justified expectedCatchCount.

files.notes: markOrderShipped + voidLabel — custom methods, connector-side bypass closed in this PR (ShipStationConnector.markOrderShipped/voidLabel now call validateOutboundWrite)

Top-level catch around /execute calls handleApprovalQueueError. PendingApprovalError rethrows at ALL three nested catch levels inside syncToNetSuite() (per-record, batch, sync) so it escapes to the top-level — single-level rethrow gets re-swallowed by the surrounding batch/sync catches (Copilot R9).
execute endpoint — NLActionGateService → dispatchAction → operator services → connectors
runHandler + syncRecordHandler closures cover 4 mount points each (${base}/:id/run + /:id/run; ${base}/:id/sync-record + /:id/sync-record)
Parallel mount of the same two routes as syncOrchestrator
data-quality/analyze — direct provider call at L115
createLegacyDataQualityRouter: analyze + generate-rules + auto-fix (the 5 createLegacyFieldMappingRouter POSTs are mock handlers that don't reach BaseProvider — intentionally skipped)
configure + troubleshoot POSTs reach AINaturalLanguageService → provider
suggestions + validate + transformation/suggest + validation/suggest + transformation/validate + defaultvalue/suggest + detect-unmappable-fields + generate-custom-field-proposal
